title: spiesia gelida
side_effects: Spiesia gelida can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and even respiratory problems. In severe cases, improper use of Spiesia gelida can cause seizures, coma, or even death. It's essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for any health benefits.
